No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with relevant digital and AI skills for humanities research, enhancing their information literacy (Target 4.4).
evidence: strengthen students' ability to use digital technology and AI for humanities research
強化學生在數位時代運用數位科技與AI進行人文研究的能力
提升其資訊搜尋和分析的資訊素養

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops skills in digital technology and AI, supporting technological upgrading and innovation for higher productivity, aligning with Target 8.2.
evidence: 強化學生應對數位與AI轉型時代挑戰的能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is centered on innovation, applying digital technology and generative AI to research, directly enhancing technological capabilities as per Target 9.5.
evidence: explore how digital technology and generative AI influence and enrich humanities research
新興數位人文技術趨勢的研討

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Digitizing resources and improving searchability can promote information inclusion, a weak link to reducing inequalities (Target 10.2), though social inequality is not explicitly addressed.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course directly supports Target 11.4 by teaching digital preservation of cultural relics and humanities archives, safeguarding cultural heritage.
evidence: 實體文物、人文檔案等實體資源的數位保存
digitization of physical artifacts, rare books, and archives

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to responsible consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to marine life or ocean conservation.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course enhances access to information via library digital resources and digitization, which weakly links to Target 16.10 (public access to information).
evidence: 圖書館的數位資源和資料庫

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course promotes interdisciplinary learning and knowledge sharing between humanities and digital fields, aligning with Target 17.6 on science, technology, and innovation cooperation.
evidence: 促進人文與數位領域的合作
